# [PKT-PRV-010](task-0077): Provider Performance Benchmarks

## Purpose

Create provider performance benchmarks.

## Scope

- Benchmark suite
- Metrics
- Reporting

## Implementation

2. Add metrics
3. Add reporting

## Acceptance Criteria

2. Metrics collected
3. Reports generated
